name: LGF Bookings
upgrade_notice: Terminal checkout note now shows guest name instead of just 'Booking #N'.

sections.description: WordPress-native hotel CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, Invoice Ninja integration, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.9.2.24: Terminal checkout note now shows guest name (e.g. 'John Smith — #123') instead of just 'Booking #123'. Makes it clear who you're charging on the terminal screen.
  • 1.9.2.23: New Square features: manual payment amount input (override the booking total), skip receipt screen checkbox, refund button (full or partial) from booking detail and guest detail pages. Refund updates payment_status to refunded.
  • 1.9.2.22: Fixed cancel checkout not refreshing page — added location.reload() so Pay with Square Terminal button reappears immediately.
  • 1.9.2.21: Added Terminal Mode section to Square Payments settings page with standalone vs Terminal API instructions, Generate Device Code button for re-pairing, and auto-fill of Device ID on re-pair.
  • 1.9.2.20: Fixed Square cancel checkout error — cancel endpoint does not accept idempotency_key in body. Now sends empty body.
  • 1.9.2.19: Fixed Square Terminal payment section missing from booking detail page — was only rendered on guest detail page. Now shows Pay with Square Terminal button on booking detail page.
  • 1.9.2.18: Fixed Square checkout not working — Terminal API requires device_id in checkout requests. Added Device ID field to Square settings and included device_options in Terminal checkout requests.
  • 1.9.2.17: Square Terminal API integration — paired terminal, added webhook endpoint (simple-hotel-crm/v1/square-webhook) for auto-payment confirmation, Square settings now show webhook URL + signature key field, fixed CSRF on square_confirm GET endpoint, added user feedback on missing checkout.
  • 1.9.2.16: ICS export now auto-syncs on new booking creation, booking deletion, transfer, and merge — no need to manually click 'Regenerate All ICS Feeds'. Previously only updated on booking edit.
  • 1.9.2.15: Fixed extras not displaying after save — SQL error in get_booking_items_by_room used wrong column name (room_sync_id vs room_id). Extras now save and display correctly.
  • 1.9.2.14: Fixed extras not saving — root cause was PHP parse error from single-quoted console.log inside echo that killed the entire file before form handler could run. Removed debug noise.
  • 1.9.2.13: Debug: added wp_die(var_export($_POST)) in form handler to diagnose pending_items not saving.
  • 1.9.2.12: Fixed JavaScript syntax error in extras functionality — console.log statements with single quotes were conflicting with PHP echo statement quotes, causing parse error on booking detail page.
  • 1.9.2.11: Fixed critical error on Square settings save — general settings handler was incorrectly triggered on all tabs, and missing argument in update_option() caused crash.
  • 1.9.2.10: Square Terminal payments — add API credentials in Settings → Square Payments, then 'Pay with Square Terminal' button on booking detail page. Auto-creates IN invoice on payment confirmation. New DB columns: payment_status, payment_method, square_checkout_id.
